sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for Genesis shmup

special_mechanics.name: Spacecraft Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player controls CNCS1 spacecraft horizontally across constantly scrolling background. Movement parameters not documented.

special_mechanics.name: Speed Modification Items
special_mechanics.description: Speed increasers can be picked up during play to modify spacecraft velocity. Exact increment values not documented.

special_mechanics.name: Firepower/Speed Penalty
special_mechanics.description: Getting hit or colliding with obstacles results in firepower and speed decreasing to original state. Penalty magnitude not specified.

special_mechanics.name: Hellfire Weapon (Genesis)
special_mechanics.description: Bomb capable of obliterating enemies within blast radius. Blast radius dimensions not documented.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Hellfire is a horizontal scrolling shooter, not a platformer. No jump physics, gravity, or character movement parameters documented. Available sources contain gameplay mechanics (weapon system, speed items, collision penalties) but no precise physics values or sub-pixel system information.
